author: Mandar Wagh
name: Shared Pyramid Transformer T=9 dim=1408
blurb: Shared weight transformer block with depth recurrence. Single shared block (dim=1408, 2.75x wider than baseline) reused 9 times sequentially. Effective depth=9, total params=15.34M. Width tradeoff achieved by tying weights across layers.
key_innovations: Single shared transformer block (weight tying across depth)
Depth recurrence: 9 passes through same block
